docs.title: Incident Handling Procedure
docs.detection_process: SIEM correlation rules, GuardDuty findings, WAF alerts, and file-integrity monitoring page the on-call responder; each alert is triaged against a documented severity matrix and analysed for scope, affected assets, and indicators of compromise before a severity is assigned.
docs.containment_eradication: Containment isolates affected hosts via security-group quarantine and revokes suspect credentials while preserving volumes and memory for forensics; eradication removes the root cause (patch, config fix, key rotation) and is verified by a clean re-scan before recovery begins.
docs.roles: Incident Commander (on-call SRE lead), Security Lead (CISO delegate), Communications Lead, and Forensics Liaison are named with primary and alternate contacts and defined decision authority.
